title: The Virtues of King Han Solo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"The Virtues of King Han Solo"''' was a song written by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] during his attempts to aid [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in his courtship of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. C-3PO wrote at least fifteen verses for the song which he performed for the Solos in a voice that sounded much like that of popular singer [[Jukas Alim]]. The poetic song was meant to convince Organa of the virtues Solo possessed that would make him a worthy husband. Leia and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] did not like the song.

==An excerpt of the song==
:He's got his own [[Dathomir/Legends|planet]],

:Although it's kind of wild.

:[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] love him.

:Women love him.

:He's got a winning smile!

:Though he may seem cool and cocky,

:He's more sensitive than he seems,

'''Chorus:'''

:Han Solo,

:What a man! Solo.

:He's every [[Prince/Legends|Princess's]] dream!

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
